entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: Economically important legume crop grown in arid regions of sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: Region where cowpea is grown and Bt-cowpea is being developed

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: Region where the risk of Bt-cowpea to non-target organisms is assessed

entities.name: LEGUME POD BORER
entities.description: An insect pest (Maruca vitrata) that causes losses in cowpea production

entities.name: BT-COWPEA
entities.description: Genetically engineered cowpea expressing cry1Ab and cry2Ab transgenes to control the legume pod borer

entities.name: CRY1AB
entities.description: A transgene (Event 709) used in the development of Bt-cowpea

entities.name: CRY2AB
entities.description: A transgene used in the development of Bt-cowpea

entities.name: BT CRY PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins expressed by Bt-cowpea used for the control of the legume pod borer

entities.name: NON-TARGET ORGANISMS
entities.description: Organisms other than the target pest that are assessed for potential effects from Bt Cry proteins

entities.name: ARTHROPODS
entities.description: A specific group of non-target organisms of particular interest in the risk assessment

entities.name: RISK ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The process of evaluating the potential effects of Bt Cry proteins on non-target organisms
